headerDisplay: Embeds an MQTT broker and routes sensor readings from aranet4 and airmega plugins to Supabase. Run this plugin on the main Homebridge instance.

port.title: MQTT Broker Port
port.description: TCP port for the embedded MQTT broker. Other plugins connect here.

topicPrefix.title: Topic Prefix
topicPrefix.description: Prefix for all subscribed topics. Must match the prefix used by publisher plugins.

key.title: Supabase Key
key.description: Use service role key to bypass RLS policies.
